name: 三维图形
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与测量 / Geometry & Measure / Geometry & Measure
curriculum_points: • 5Gg.04 Identify, describe and sketch 3D shapes in different orientations.
• 5Gg.05 Identify and sketch different nets for a cube.
• 6Gg.04 Identify, describe and sketch compound 3D shapes.
• 6Gg.06 Identify and sketch different nets for cubes, cuboids, prisms and pyramids.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「三维图形」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：• 5Gg.04 Identify, describe and sketch 3D shapes in different orientations.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：• 5Gg.05 Identify and sketch different nets for a cube.… 对理解「三维图形」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
